triggers_red_phase_verification.description: Agent must verify failing red interaction tests exist and fail for the right reason before green-phase implementation
triggers_red_phase_verification.observable_check: execution_log shows failing red interaction tests verified before green-phase implementation begins

triggers_green_phase_verification.description: Agent must run all interaction tests and confirm green after implementation
triggers_green_phase_verification.observable_check: execution_log shows green interaction tests pass after implementation with captured evidence

triggers_user_facing_behavior_verificati.description: Agent must verify actual click, keyboard, focus interactions and real backend integration when integration is part of task
triggers_user_facing_behavior_verificati.observable_check: execution_log shows actual user interactions verified AND (no backend integration in task OR real backend seam exercised)

verifies_red_tests_fail_before_implement.description: Agent must confirm failing interaction tests exist and fail for the correct reason before green-phase
verifies_red_tests_fail_before_implement.observable_check: execution_log shows red tests exist AND fail for correct reason before implementation begins

verifies_green_tests_pass_after_implemen.description: Agent must run all interaction tests and confirm green after implementation with actual test run evidence
verifies_green_tests_pass_after_implemen.observable_check: execution_log shows green tests pass with actual test run evidence captured

verifies_real_backend_integration.description: Agent must verify real backend call traced through component when backend integration is part of task, not mocked seam
verifies_real_backend_integration.observable_check: execution_log shows real backend API call traced through component AND response handled correctly

does_not_modify_oracle_to_pass.description: Agent must not change tests to pass instead of fixing the implementation
does_not_modify_oracle_to_pass.observable_check: execution_log does not show test code modified to make tests pass

does_not_claim_storybook_as_interaction_.description: Agent must not claim interaction verified based on storybook rendering or isolated component display
does_not_claim_storybook_as_interaction_.observable_check: execution_log does not claim interaction verified based solely on storybook screenshot or isolated rendering

does_not_skip_accessibility_verification.description: Agent must not implement interactive component without verifying keyboard navigation and ARIA
does_not_skip_accessibility_verification.observable_check: execution_log does not skip keyboard navigation or ARIA verification for interactive components
